principle: Each lane is a deep-execution cockpit; the graph keeps collective context coherent. Every lane is one point in a 3-axis space: Domain x Mode x Aspect. The UI only renders this file. Nothing here is end-to-end automation — it is structured human-in-the-loop execution.
boundary: Operations = Claude (single-writer). Marketing = Codex (see _context/Marketing_Unified_Control_2026-05-24/marketing-execution-graph.json). Shared assets (WhatsApp number, FB login, Odoo, hn-winpc) are read-coordinated, never co-written.

context_state_legend.LOAD: Rich context already exists (memory + repo + D1) - ingest now.
context_state_legend.SEED: Partial context exists - seed and grow.
context_state_legend.LIVE: Greenfield - context is built by operating; the chat is the instrument.

lanes.title: 00 Operations Master Control
lanes.summary: Front door + CATCH-ALL: exception inbox · money-in-motion · data-freshness boards · lane index · and the home for ANY operation that fits no lane — accepts it, routes it, extends the graph so reality is never forced into a stale lane. Owns COA grammar/entity-rings, comms-core, fleet/winpc health, AI-budget.
lanes.next_action: Accept unclassified demands; add new points to graph.json as reality reveals them (productive failure, never silent).

lanes.title: 01 POS Order Edits
lanes.status: live — grammar E1-E6 locked; 7 HE bills corrected 2026-05-25 (net -INR 1489.36 phantom revenue removed)
lanes.summary: Void/comp/correct a specific order. Transaction-level corrections + audit log. NOT catalog config (that is Codex 03).
lanes.next_action: Build /ops/pos-editor surfacing E1-E6 as the only edit entry points; fill open extension points (qty-fix, product-swap, customer-attribute, tax-bucket-fix, closed-session-correction) as encountered.

lanes.title: 02 Sale Discrepancy
lanes.summary: POS sales vs recorded vs expected. NCH token-issue recon branched (nch-sales-recon-slice-a/b/c); HE side not yet built.
lanes.next_action: Land NCH recon slices; scope HE sale-vs-cash recon.

lanes.title: 06 POS Anomalies
lanes.summary: Outlier detection on orders/sessions - voids, discount spikes, odd patterns. Built by observing real POS behavior.
lanes.next_action: Watch first: capture what an anomaly actually looks like before coding rules.

lanes.title: 12 Prep Time
lanes.summary: KDS bump-to-serve timing per item/station. Reads KDS; writes timing metrics. Unknown how kitchen uses KDS yet - learn first.
lanes.next_action: Observe real KDS usage by kitchen staff; record the pattern.

lanes.title: 13 Item-Sold-Despite-No-RM
lanes.summary: Orders accepted while raw material was out - lost-sale + stockout truth. Cross-references RM stock vs POS sales.
lanes.next_action: Define stockout event from RM closing-zero + continued POS sale.

lanes.title: 10 Vendor Payment
lanes.risk: money mutation — surface irreversible to Nihaf
lanes.summary: Record + schedule + reconcile vendor bills/payments against POs. Direct-1:1 cash vs vendor-due credit. Writes rm_vendor_bills + payments. Richest context - first leaf to grow deep.
lanes.next_action: Grow deep pack: vendor-intel dossiers + rm_vendor_bills schema + approval gate.

lanes.title: 09 Salary
lanes.status: prior session crashed (1052-entry long-session -> 400 role:system); context SAVED, reopen reads it
lanes.summary: Payable from attendance + advances ledger. Writes hr_payroll_snapshots + hr_advances. Reads Workforce/Attendance. Labour-law constrained.
lanes.next_action: Reopen lane -> read 09-salary-SAVED-2026-05-25.md. Build: pay-advance + settle option; advance paid -> INSTANT WABA msg; MANUAL salary over-write (attendance gaps this month); easy owner-entered calc; NO share-link.

lanes.title: 14 UPI Build & Context
lanes.summary: Counter UPI rail build + payment context (Paytm/Razorpay). HE UPI transition in flight.
lanes.next_action: Finish HE UPI transition mapping; tie UPI rail to bank recon (#20).

lanes.title: 03 Cash Discrepancy
lanes.summary: Counter cash counted vs POS cash-sales vs deposits, incl. Basheer's opening float + cash purchases. Writes cash-variance.
lanes.next_action: Define float + cash-purchase capture; reconcile to POS cash tender.

lanes.title: 20 Bank / Treasury Recon
lanes.summary: HDFC / Federal / Razorpay / Paytm statements vs Odoo. Broader than counter-cash; UPI (#14) is a subset.
lanes.next_action: Statement-to-Odoo matcher per account; flag unmatched.

lanes.title: 19 Aggregator Payout Recon
lanes.summary: Swiggy/Zomato payouts vs orders vs commission leakage. Reads aggregator-pulse finance. Revenue-side; distinct from POS sale discrepancy.
lanes.next_action: Compare payout vs expected (orders x (1-commission)); flag shortfall.

lanes.title: 07 COGS Purchase (track/predict/place)
lanes.summary: Purchase ledger + consumption-based prediction + PO placement. Chicken/buns ledger live this week. Zoya's lane. Feeds discrepancy (#4/#5).
lanes.next_action: Wire consumption-rate predictor off purchase ledger + recipe map.

lanes.title: 08 Price Intelligence
lanes.summary: Vendor price tracking/benchmarking. Chicken + buns intel live. Surfaces effective-rate drift feeding variance value in #4.
lanes.next_action: Generalize chicken/buns intel pattern to top COGS SKUs.

lanes.title: 05 Inventory Discrepancy
lanes.summary: DIRECT_1_TO_1 stock reconciliation: opening + purchased - sold/issued = physical closing. Water/soft-drinks/buns/packaging (Nazeer, Ganga, Deepak). Home of Codex-04 'direct discrepancy'. Spec exists; engine not built.
lanes.next_action: Implement direct-1:1 settlement for Nazeer water/drinks + Ganga buns (least recipe complexity).

lanes.title: 04 Wastage / Variance
lanes.summary: VARIANCE/yield discrepancy: actual_used (opening+purchase-closing) vs expected_used (sum POS qty x recipe). Chicken (M.N. Broilers) is the prototype. Detects unrecorded wastage/yield-loss. Depends on recipe map (entity-ring).
lanes.next_action: Build M.N. Broilers variance-yield prototype; requires recipe-grams map first.

lanes.title: 22 Hiring
lanes.summary: Recruitment funnel: source -> enrich -> outreach -> shortlist -> hand to Onboarding (#18). Built: /hiring/enrich (Gemini 21-role classifier), /hiring/waba (campaign+inbox), /hiring/fb (group-posting control plane). Greenfield: Apna, WorkIndia, the FB-posting .gs executor (owner to upload).
lanes.next_action: Upload FB-posting .gs + Apna/WorkIndia mechanics; decide executor (AppScript vs Claude-in-Chrome on winpc).

lanes.title: 18 Onboarding / Exit
lanes.summary: Joiner/leaver lifecycle + probation. Writes hr_exits, hr_probation. Receives hires from #22; hands attendance to #16. Barcode HN{BRAND}{BIO} on hr.employee + res.partner.
lanes.next_action: Confirm joiner->Odoo+barcode+Drive-docs flow; wire exit/probation.

lanes.title: 16 Attendance & Roster
lanes.summary: CAMS biometric attendance, roster truth, ghost-PIN audit, kitchen headcount. Feeds Salary (#9). ~26-29 realistically active vs 31 on paper.
lanes.next_action: Resolve ghost PINs (11/22/42/45/46) vs roster before next payroll.

lanes.title: 17 Labour Compliance
lanes.summary: ESI/S&E, contracts/eSign (Leegality), statutory deadlines. Option C ESI pass-through, 31 employees. Labour-law hard limits apply.
lanes.next_action: Track ESIC + S&E registration to closure; deadline calendar.

lanes.title: 11 CCTV
lanes.status: NVR mapped+reordered 2026-05-25; DISK FAULT (0GB, not recording) - HDD swap 26 May; channel-names + pw-rotation pending
lanes.summary: CP Plus CP-UNR-4K2162-V3 16-ch 4K NVR @192.168.31.53 covering BOTH HE+NCH. Channel map locked (CH01=HE cash cam, CH10=NCH token cam = the video truth-sources for cash/sale recon). Dahua-CGI digest-auth API control. Flat JioFiber LAN; remote via Tailscale/hn-winpc.
lanes.next_action: After 26-May HDD swap: confirm recording starts; write channel names; ROTATE leaked NVR admin pw (hn-save CCTV_NVR_ADMIN_PW); wire CH01/CH10 money-cams into cash(03)/sale(02) recon.

lanes.title: 21 Cost-Truth / P&L
lanes.summary: Rolls COGS% / labour% / wastage% / cash+payout variance into margin. Executes nothing; reads every lane. The outcome layer - answers 'is leakage down, is margin up'.
lanes.next_action: Aggregate the four cost lines into one weekly margin view once feeders emit.

lanes.title: 23 Money Ledger
lanes.risk: money truth — surface irreversible to Nihaf
lanes.summary: Cockpit over the EXISTING cash+bank treasury (cash.js/bank-feed.js/money.js) — NOT a new ledger. Runs cash_events (cash) + money_events (bank), seeds the fresh float via external_capital_in, reconciles, and fills the gaps (owed-to-Nihaf, vendor-payable, unified view, chat-write door). Opening: cash ₹2L to seed · bank ₹1,330.38 live · owed-to-Nihaf ₹2,09,940.87 deferred.
lanes.next_action: OPERATE (in the lane chat, real-time): seed ₹2L via cash.js external_capital_in→cash_nihaf; reconcile ₹44.86 bank drift; model owner-owed ₹2.09L; set vendor-payable from Basheer handover.

lanes.title: 24 Device Fleet & Endpoints
lanes.status: live endpoint state captured 2026-05-27; winpc=NCH cash POS; printer .196; NUC->Frigate pending
lanes.summary: Device-level control of every endpoint across HE+NCH — POS PCs (NCH cash=winpc, NCH runner, HE cash), POS-bridge extensions + pos-health beacons, receipt printers (Epson IPs), Tailscale fleet, Chrome profiles/policies, the winpc multi-tenant appliance + Frigate NUC. The physical/endpoint control plane. NOT transaction edits (01), NOT CCTV eyes (11).
lanes.next_action: Static-reserve NCH printer .196 on dongle router; rotate NVR admin pw (hn-save); upgrade winpc pos-bridge ext v1.2.0->v1.2.2; NUC->Frigate build (gated on NCH POS stability).

served: ops/ops-control/ (PIN-gated, co-located with UI; not exposed via /_context/)

money_model.controller: Nihaf - single finance writer from 2026-05-25. Zoya enters purchases (POs) in /ops/purchase + /ops/rm; ALL payment/finance updates flow through Nihaf via the money-ledger chat.
money_model.rule: Balances DERIVED by summing delta_paise per account across ledger.jsonl. NEVER store a mutable balance. Money in paise.

cash.source: External funding + daily outlet cash (HE+NCH) collected by Nihaf from today.
cash.desc: Fresh float Rs 4,00,000 now in hand (Rs 2L + Rs 2L received 25-May). To SEED into cash.js external_capital_in -> cash_nihaf. NOT yet recorded in the live cash ledger.

bank4680.desc: HDFC ·4680 - LIVE feed (money_events, HDFC email alerts). Static value here is an opening snapshot only; ops-control overlays the real-time balance from /api/bank-feed when a PIN is present. Accuracy note: charges/GST/interest are not email-alerted - re-anchor to monthly e-statement.

owed_to_nihaf.claim_status: DEFERRED - not a current claim. Company running negative on profitability; Nihaf reimburses only when funds exist. Do NOT net against cash, do NOT treat as deployable.
owed_to_nihaf.desc: Rs 1,94,940.87 (16-23 May) + Rs 15,000 (24 May Tasmiya standing tables). DEFERRED; NOT modeled in any live table yet (gap #1).

funding.note: Rs 7.5L external. Rs 4L received (Rs 2L + Rs 2L on 25-May), now in hand as cash. Rs 3.5L remaining in tranches.

money_model.personal_reserve_note: Nihaf's own Rs 8L reserve - draw-down source, not company cash. Each injection: funded account up + owed_to_nihaf up.
money_model.daily_inflow_note: Outlet collection HE+NCH ~Rs 50-60k/day from today: CASH to Nihaf's hand, online/UPI/card to ·4680. Basheer no longer collects.

vendor_payables.odoo_formal_ap_note: Only Rs 19,160 across 2 posted bills (HE Rs 18,160 + NCH Rs 1,000) - Odoo AP essentially unused.
vendor_payables.open_po_volume_note: 946 open POs = Rs 9,79,330 purchase VOLUME 31Mar-24May (HE Rs 2.87L + NCH Rs 6.87L), all invoice_status=no. This is what was BOUGHT, not what is owed - Basheer cash-cleared most outside Odoo.
vendor_payables.real_opening_status: TO BE SET MANUALLY by Nihaf from Basheer handover - cannot be auto-derived (cash-cleared outside Odoo). Once set: every vendor payment = cash/bank down + vendor_payable down.

money_model.old_regime_closeout: Basheer's cash collected up to 2026-05-24 clears OLD vendor dues. Fresh float starts clean from 2026-05-25.
open_reconciliations: Rs 4L cash in hand - SEED into live cash ledger (cash_nihaf) via the lane chat / /ops/cash external-capital-in; not yet recorded live.
VENDOR PAYABLE OPENING: set manually - Odoo can't tell us (POs are a log, not AP; cash-cleared by Basheer).

/ops/bank Rs 1,375.24 vs statement Rs 1,330.38 = +Rs 44.86 drift; pin on bank ingest.

cash.does: running cash balance, piles (pos_counter_he/nch, cash_basheer, cash_nihaf), anchor+delta. Actions: balance/trail/sync-status/external_capital_in/transfer/deposit-to-bank/reconcile/sync. PIN-gated.
cash.status: built; barely seeded - ready for the real float

bank.does: running bank balance HDFC ·4680 + Federal, per-txn reconcile.

unified.does: cash-position merges cash+bank into one grand_total

money_model.ops_control_role: ops-control Money panel = launchpad + opening context only. Live balances live in /ops/cash, /ops/bank, /ops/money. NOT a duplicate ledger.
money_model.superseded: ops/ops-control/ledger.jsonl (the 4 jsonl rows) is SUPERSEDED by the live treasury — kept only as the audit of the owed-to-Nihaf opening + Rs 15k Tasmiya entry until owner-owed is modeled.
gaps: owed_to_nihaf Rs 2,09,940.87 - NOT modeled in cash_events/money_events. Needs an owner-equity/loan running balance (new cash_events kind owner_loan or a small table). Deferred liability.
vendor payables as a local D1 number (today Odoo read-only).
single unified view incl payables + owed (money.js cash-position omits both).
Claude/chat two-way write door over the existing PIN endpoints.

money.js cash-position 'cash' = OUTLET petty+in-transit (cockpit-export feeds), NOT Nihaf's deployable float. The Rs 4L float must be seeded into cash_events (cash_nihaf) AND the unified view extended to include it - else no live view shows the float. Also: the read APIs require a PIN, so ops-control cannot pull them anonymously.
